(1) `finiteMoment4_of_admissible (h : Admissible v μ) : FiniteMoment4 μ`. `haveI := h.isProb`. Each field via `Integrable.mono'`: from `integrable_const (1:ℝ)` (finite measure), AEStronglyMeasurable of the power (`(continuous_pow k).aestronglyMeasurable` or `(continuous_id).aestronglyMeasurable`), and the a.e. bound `‖y^k‖ ≤ 1`: `h.supp.mono` with `fun y hy => by rw [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (by positivity)]; exact pow_le_one₀ hy.1 hy.2` (for `int1` use `|y|≤1` via `abs_le.2 ⟨by linarith [hy.1,hy.2], hy.2⟩`). Build `⟨_, _, _, _⟩`.

(2) `moment2_le_moment1 (h) : moment μ 2 ≤ moment μ 1`. Unfold `moment` to `∫ y^2 ≤ ∫ y^1`. Use `integral_mono_ae` with integrabilities from `finiteMoment4_of_admissible h` (note `moment μ 1 = ∫ y^1 = ∫ y`; reconcile with `pow_one` / `simp [pow_one]`) and a.e. bound `y^2 ≤ y^1` from `h.supp` (`y∈[0,1] → y^2 ≤ y`, e.g. `by nlinarith [hy.1, hy.2]`).

(3) `moment1_sq_le_moment2 (h) : (moment μ 1)^2 ≤ moment μ 2`. This is Var ≥ 0. `haveI := h.isProb`. Use `ProbabilityTheory.variance_eq_sub` (needs `MemLp (fun y=>y) 2 μ`, obtainable from bounded support / `FiniteMoment4`) giving `variance id μ = ∫ id^2 - (∫ id)^2`, plus `ProbabilityTheory.variance_nonneg`. Then `(∫ y)^2 ≤ ∫ y^2`. Reconcile `moment μ 1 = ∫ y`, `moment μ 2 = ∫ y^2` and `id`/`fun y=>y` and `X^2` pointwise (`∫ (X^2) x = ∫ (X x)^2`) via `simp [moment, pow_one]`. If `variance` route is fiddly, alternatively use `ProbabilityTheory.variance_le_expectation_sq` combined with `variance_eq_sub`.

(4) `crossMoment_nonneg (h) : 0 ≤ crossMoment (moment μ 1) (moment μ 2) (moment μ 3) (moment μ 4)`. Let `c := ME.extremalMid (moment μ 1) (moment μ 2)` and `g := fun y:ℝ => y*(1-y)*(y-c)^2`. Key identity (prove by expanding + integrating termwise, mirroring the `residualQuad_eq` proof in Causalean/Stat/Nonparametric/L2ResidualQuadratic.lean): `crossMoment (moment μ 1)(moment μ 2)(moment μ 3)(moment μ 4) = ∫ y, g y ∂μ`, because `g y = -y^4 + (1+2c)*y^3 - (2c+c^2)*y^2 + c^2*y` and integrating gives `-moment μ 4 + (1+2c)*moment μ 3 - (2c+c^2)*moment μ 2 + c^2*moment μ 1`, which is exactly `crossMoment` unfolded (`unfold crossMoment`). Use `integral_add/integral_sub/integral_const_mul` with the four integrabilities from `finiteMoment4_of_admissible h` (and `h.isProb`). Then `0 ≤ ∫ g` by `integral_nonneg_of_ae` with `h.supp.mono (fun y hy => by have:0≤y*(1-y):=by nlinarith [hy.1,hy.2]; positivity)` (or `mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg hy.1 (by linarith [hy.2])) (sq_nonneg _)`). Finish by rewriting with the identity.

Use the lean-lsp MCP tools to check your proof (diagnostics/goal). When done, output a SHORT plain-text report: which decls you closed, which remain, and any blocker. No JSON required.
